<parameter=code>

        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  c: [{min(rows)},{min(cols)}]-[{max(rows)},{max(cols)}], px={n['pixels']}")

        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  N: [{min(rows)},{min(cols)}]-[{max(rows)},{max(cols)}], px={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
